creator: jsa@wickedmachine.net
text:
This bumps liboggz to 0.9.6. This changes the shared lib version from oggz.3 to oggz.4 so dependant ports need a bump as well. This appears to be just audio/aqualung.

And since we are bumping aqualung, may as well update it too. So bump aqualung to 0.9beta10 while we are here.

Both of these ports are maintained by ports@.
